evidence_items.summary: oshi-note PR #506 was merged into develop on 2026-06-26T05:21:51Z with merge commit b0ef34d61a81748a6bcfcc3a5b8012507bc14440.
PR Gate completed successfully for pr-template-check and quality jobs.
Review packet records production-disabled flag, publishable campaign gate, profile attribution privacy guard, QA verdicts, validation evidence, rollback plan, and scope-out items.
Runtime evidence packet records local and CI validation used for PR #506 readiness.
The external receipt explicitly records that PR #506 exceeds PPEP-ON-VPR-001's policy-only scope and must not auto-close PR-ON-VPR-001.

human_decisions_applied.evidence: PR #506 publishable campaign gate requires verified_status=verified.
PR #506 does not add creator aggregation dashboard; low-count threshold remains documented for future dashboard work.
PR #506 stores only low-cardinality referral tokens and does not expose normal memo content to referral partners.
PR #506 keeps public comments out of MVP scope.
PR #506 does not implement moderation because public comments remain out of scope.
PR #506 supports PR / provided-by disclosure on the VTuber referral page and share-kit text.
PR #506 publishable campaign gate requires material_permission_status=permitted and documents material permission rules.
PR #506 documents that YouTube / Twitch API Data is not used in the MVP.

open_risks: Scope deviation remains for FDA planning: PR #506 bundled runtime implementation that PPEP-ON-VPR-001 scoped out. Planning artifacts should be split or backfilled before closing PR-ON-VPR-001, PR-ON-VPR-002, or PR-ON-VPR-006.
notes: This evidence packet completes the structured evidence return expected by PPEP-ON-VPR-001, while preserving the scope-deviation warning. ready_for_review means the returned evidence is ready for manual delivery-tracking review, not that PR-ON-VPR-001 should be auto-closed.
